query: SELECT `key`, `value`, `description` FROM system_settings WHERE `key` IN ('daily_spend_limit_usd', 'generation_paused', 'publishing_paused', 'ads_paused', 'bot_score_ad_cutoff', 'min_publish_score', 'min_safety_score', 'm0_validated') ORDER BY `key`
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wCcvzbmKRw9Pje.541775a93539 --database i2oxkxp52Nqaqoc37frtnY --execute SELECT `key`, `value`, `description` FROM system_settings WHERE `key` IN ('daily_spend_limit_usd', 'generation_paused', 'publishing_paused', 'ads_paused', 'bot_score_ad_cutoff', 'min_publish_score', 'min_safety_score', 'm0_validated') ORDER BY `key`

rows.description: Global pause switch for ad serving
